rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Authorizing And Confirming Sale Of Receivership Real Property Located At 3947 18th Street San Francisco California Free And Clear Of Liens And Encumbrances
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2023 line 1. OTHER KEVIN (RECEIVER) SINGER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Authorizing And Confirming Sale Of Receivership Real Property Located At 3947 18th Street San Francisco California Free And Clear Of Liens And Encumbrances Hearing Required. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SVSP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ET AL VS. PATRICK J.W. CHIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Caption And Court Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2023 line 3. PLAINTIFF SVSP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, SIMONE CHIANG, WILLIAM TSENG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Caption And Court Record is DENIED. This motion is not supported by any authorities. The Court further notes that Plaintiff apparently seeks to only change the caption of the case, but not the allegations in the operative verified amended complaint, which inter alia include paragraph 5: "Plaintiff the William Tseng Living Trust dated June 3, 2004 (the "Tseng Trust"), is a 19% member of the Company." =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SVSP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ET AL VS. PATRICK J.W. CHIANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2023 line 3. PLAINTIFF SVSP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, SIMONE CHIANG, WILLIAM TSENG Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is DENIED. This petition is filed within an action to which some of the parties to the Arbitration and to the Agreement giving rise to the arbitration proceeding, are not also parties. (e.g. Simone Chiang, individually; William Tseng, individually; William Tseng, as trustee of 2004 Trust; William Tseng as Trustee of 2018 Trust). No authority or argument is provided for the procedural propriety of such petition. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 3050-3058 CESAR CHAVEZ, LLC, VS. CECILIA MATIAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2023 line 8. DEFENDANT CECILIA MATIAS, HEATHER TABIOS DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Moving party failed to show that any of the required information has not been provided to the tenants or that any of the information that was required to be provided was incorrect/incomplete, etc. Moving party also failed to show that superfluous and gratuitous language in a "Cover Letter" renders the termination to tenancy under the Ellis Act ineffective. The argument regarding 1:27-2:2). compliance with SFRO 37.9A(f)(3)(E)(iii) is overruled again. (August 18, 2023 Order)=(501/SKF) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: FRANK LUCCHETTI VS. NKECHI EMERUWA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2023 line 10. DEFENDANT NKECHI EMERUWA-NEUBERG Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions is continued to October 16, 2023. No later than October 12, 2023 by 5:00 p.m. Defendant to provide evidence from the medical provider (1) stating the date of inception of "acute exacerbation" of Defendant's condition, (2) stating what aspects of litigation the defendant is able to proceed with at this time and (3) the approximate timeline of when the defendant will be out of "acute exacerbation" state. Counsel for defendant to inform the medical provider of all the remaining aspects of litigation, e.g. motions, outstanding discovery, settlement conference, trial, etc. Plaintiff may file a response by 9:00 a.m. on October 16, 2023.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
